title: Double Ender Chest
description: A simple server-side and client-side mod that doubles the Ender Chest inventory from 27 to 54 slots, perfect for players who always run out of Ender Chest space.
body:
This mod upgrades the Ender Chest into a spacious double-sized inventory, giving players significantly more storage while preserving the original Minecraft feel and mechanics.

All features are handled entirely on the server side, ensuring full compatibility with vanilla clients. Players can join without installing the mod, making it easy to add to existing servers without any extra setup or client requirements.

It also works seamlessly in singleplayer worlds, since Minecraft uses an integrated server internally. This means you get the same enhanced storage experience whether you are playing alone or on a multiplayer server, without changing how the game is launched or played.
